title: Flower Rings
description:
This datapack adds a new little structure that can generate if forests - Flower Fairy Rings!
And maybe you will find some treasure below them!
body:
# About:
_preview:_
![img_1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/329c139031198aa0c6232bb5e8d5ace770742483.png)
Flower Fairy Rings: You can find them inside of the forests.
Rings that are made from flowers can be hiding around the forest areas.
and you may find some treasure in the middle of them! 

Explore the forests, and you may find them, with a bit of treasure hiding below!
# DataPack:
<details>
<summary>Warning!</summary>

Wip: Currently the way they generate is not as I originally intended; that is because of a game bug and is subject to change!

</details>

### List of things to be added:
- More flower ring variants
- More treasure variants
- Treasure loot tables

# Feedback
If you have any suggestions for this datapack, you can join the discord server and write it down.

Also if you have a suggestion for a new datapack, you can also writhe it in discord server!
